tracks.rawText: 3:38Miedo a tiv5.5Epic psytrance track at 145 BPM with powerful prehispanic Mexican tribal influences, Highly rhythmic, energetic and hypnotic with exciting evolving loops and dynamic progression, Dominant and powerful ancient flutes like quena and ocarina, with intense melodic leads, fast arpeggios and layered harmonies, Strong tribal percussion including huehuetl and teponaztli with complex, driving rhythms, Deep rolling psytrance bassline, punchy kick, and rich psychedelic sound design with delays, reverbs and spatial effects, Jungle ambience, wind, mystical textures and ritual chanting elements, The track should feel like a massive ancient ceremony, epic, magical, transcendental and full of energy, building emotional intensity and hypnotic trance1PublishRemix
tracks.title: Miedo a ti

tracks.rawText: 5:10Coatxav5.5Psytrance track with prehispanic Mexican tribal influences, highly rhythmic and hypnotic, magical atmosphere, BPM 145, driving and energetic groove, Prominent ancient flutes like quena and ocarina with rich melodies, fast patterns and layered harmonies, Strong tribal percussion like huehuetl and teponaztli with complex rhythmic patterns, Deep rolling psytrance bassline, psychedelic effects, echo, reverb, and spatial movement, Jungle ambience, wind sounds, and mystical textures, Ritual chanting elements, The vibe should feel like a powerful ancient ceremony in the jungle under the stars, deeply hypnotic, spiritual, magical and energetic1PublishRemix

tracks.rawText: 4:25Eterno Deshielov5.5Club-ready blend of deep house and melodic techno under an “Eskimo-style” chant aesthetic; male vocals in a hypnotic call-and-response with airy backing choir, Gliding sub bass, tight four-on-the-floor kick, and glossy synth arps that swell into a wide, euphoric chorus, Verses stay minimal and percussive, chorus opens with bright pads, stereo claps, and a rising filter sweep for a tundra-meets-warehouse climax, deep house, techno3PublishRemix
tracks.title: Eterno Deshielo
